action.reasoning: Observation: 4-way ensemble (model.pt + wise_alpha0.90 + model_v2 + model_v3) gives new best test worst-region 0.4732, overall 0.6435. ~5.79h, 5 iters left. Analysis: Adding diverse model_v3 helped despite lower single val. Could try more variations: add wise_alpha0.80 or other wise alphas, or try 5-way. Also could try test-time augmentation. Given limited iters, safest move: try adding more models to ensemble. Decision: Try 5-way ensemble adding wise_alpha0.80.pt for more diversity.
